creator: Carpetsmoker@rwxrwxrwx.net
text:
Hi,

I submitted a PR (ports/123126) which also updates pekwm to 0.1.6, and
in addition adds mirrors for the pekwm distfiles.

Can you take a look at that PR please?
You can also set me (carpetsmoker@xs4all.nl) as maintainer.

-- 
Martin Tournoij
carpetsmoker@xs4all.nl
http://www.daemonforums.org

I've given up reading books; I find it takes my mind off myself.
